reportingTool.creatingReport: Report is being created. Please wait.
reportingTool.reportSuccess: The report has been successfully generated. The download will start automatically.
reportingTool.title: Create report
reportingTool.toolInfoText: This tool converts your current portal status directly into a structured report. All active technical data, statistics, and accessibility analyses are automatically recorded. An interactive stepper guides you through the individual chapters, where you can refine your selection for the report—including an appendix with legends and sources. For quick documentation, you can skip the detailed configuration on the first page to immediately output all portal contents in a complete document. Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
reportingTool.infoText: Your configuration is now complete. You can generate the final document with all selected content by clicking Download report . If you would like to make corrections to the chapters or your selection, click Back to edit view to return directly to your previous settings. If you would like to discard the current compilation and start again with the initial portal view, please select Create new report.
reportingTool.optionalComponents: Optional components of the report to be exported
reportingTool.infrastructureHint: Note: If there are more than 10 institutions, no infrastructure data table is displayed.
